title: Feature: Hand Tracking Masking
description: Mask out areas outside of the map to prevent players whose hands are normally around the map to activate menus and such actions. The GM is located either on one side to the map, or on one diagonal to the map (meaning two sides do not need masking). Configurable setting with menu entries for the direction where the GM is located (or to disable masking).

title: Design: Initial markdown design in features/
description: Write the initial markdown design in features/ (DESIGN ONLY, no code).

title: Design: Review and refinement
description: Review and refine the design (design only, no code).

title: Design: Detailed specifications
description: Add phases, tests needed, data types and interface specifications (design only, no code).

title: Design: Final readiness review
description: Final round of readiness review and refinement for implementation approval (design only, no code).

title: Planning: Generate new beads for phased implementation
description: Generate new beads for phased implementation based on the finalized design.

title: Planning: Test implementation for TDD development
Planning: Implementation phases
Planning: Review of missing implementation details
Epic: Improved Calibration and Marker Defaults Implementation
description: Implement the multi-step calibration wizard (PPI, Extrinsics) and global ArUco defaults as described in features/improved_calibration_and_marker_defaults.md.

title: Review Design: Improved Calibration
description: DESIGN REVIEW ONLY. Review features/improved_calibration_and_marker_defaults.md for completeness and readiness for implementation. Verify the math for pose estimation (solvePnP) and the proposed data structures for ArUco defaults. No code implementation allowed during this task.

title: DESIGN ONLY: Define User Feedback for solvePnP Residuals (QUESTION TO USER)
description: DESIGN REFINEMENT ONLY. No code. Determine how to communicate calibration quality (reprojection error) to the user during the solvePnP step.

title: DESIGN ONLY: Define Multi-token Calibration Flow
description: DESIGN REFINEMENT ONLY. No code. Detail the interactive sequence for placing and identifying tokens of different heights during Step 3 of calibration.

title: DESIGN ONLY: Define Named Token Profiles (Small, Medium, Large)
description: Design an abstraction for token 'sizes' (Small, Medium, Large, etc.) that maps to physical dimensions (mm) in the global configuration, allowing users to reference named profiles instead of raw mm values for common tokens.

title: Document Token Tracking System
description: Create a comprehensive guide for the token tracking system (docs/token_tracking.md). Include detailed instructions for ArUco, Flash-based, and Structured Light detection. Document configuration (aruco_tokens), session persistence, and visual feedback states (unknown/duplicate markers). Provide troubleshooting tips for lighting and occlusion.

title: Add manual configuration examples to documentation
description: Add practical examples to docs/configuration.md for settings that are typically edited manually, such as aruco_defaults, token_profiles, and map-specific aruco_overrides in map_state.json.

title: Improve calibration and marker defaults
description: 1. Add default marker configuration for new maps. 2. Expand projector_calibration.py to include PPI calibration and camera pose estimation (extrinsics) using markers of known height. Handle imprecise marker placement by using the homography to find the base (X, Y) of detected markers.

title: Modularize and update README.md
description: The README.md is getting too large. Modularize it by moving detailed sections (Calibration, Gestures, Map System) to a 'docs/' folder. Update the main README to be a high-level overview with quick-start instructions and links to the detailed documentation.

title: Feature: Robust Logging
description: Implement a robust logging system to identify where to add error logging (including crashes), warnings, and informational activity execution to track general events. This will aid in post-mortem analysis and real-time monitoring.

title: Design: Initial markdown design in features/
description: Write the initial markdown design in features/ (DESIGN ONLY, no code).

title: Design: Review and refinement
description: Review and refine the design (design only, no code).

title: Design: Detailed specifications
description: Add phases, tests needed, data types and interface specifications (design only, no code).

title: Design: Final readiness review
description: Final round of readiness review and refinement for implementation approval (design only, no code).

title: Planning: Generate new beads for phased implementation
description: Generate new beads for phased implementation based on the finalized design.

title: Planning: Test implementation for TDD development
Planning: Implementation phases
Planning: Review of missing implementation details
Include Ground Plane (Z=0) Points in Extrinsics Calibration
description: Update ExtrinsicsCalibrationScene to include known ground points from the initial homography in the solvePnP calculation for improved stability. Refer to features/improved_calibration_and_marker_defaults.md Section 3.3.

title: Epic: ArUco-Based Token Tracking Implementation
description: Implement real-time ArUco tracking with parallax correction, grid snapping, and temporal filtering as described in features/aruco_token_tracking.md.

title: Review Design: ArUco Tracking
description: DESIGN REVIEW ONLY. Review features/aruco_token_tracking.md for completeness and readiness for implementation. Ensure the parallax correction ray-plane intersection logic is robust and grid snapping for nxn tokens is well-defined. No code implementation allowed during this task.

title: DESIGN ONLY: Define Handling of Marker Occlusion Buffers (QUESTION TO USER)
description: DESIGN REFINEMENT ONLY. No code. Determine the specific timeout/buffer strategy for maintaining token visibility when markers are temporarily occluded by hands.

title: DESIGN ONLY: Define ID Conflict Strategy
description: DESIGN REFINEMENT ONLY. No code. Define the fallback behavior and default properties for ArUco IDs that are detected but not configured.

title: DESIGN ONLY: Evaluate Auto-Detection vs. Fixed Height for Stability
description: DESIGN REFINEMENT ONLY. No code. Compare the stability of Ray-Plane intersection (using fixed height_mm) against real-time ArUco pose estimation. Decide if the system should favor stability or auto-detection of heights.

title: Implement ArucoTokenDetector core with cv2.solvePnP parallax correction
Add ArUco token configuration and mapping to MapConfigManager
Integrate ArucoTokenDetector into TokenTracker and InteractiveApp
Implement Grid Snapping and Temporal Filtering for ArUco tokens
Final Validation: Performance and Accuracy testing with physical tokens
Add Visual Feedback for solvePnP Residuals
description: Add a validation HUD to the ExtrinsicsCalibrationScene to show calibration quality. Refer to features/solvepnp_feedback_design.md. Display RMS Reprojection Error and per-point residual vectors (Green/Yellow/Red).

title: Design Aruco-based token tracking
description: Create a design document in features/ for tracking tokens using Aruco markers. Address elevation/parallax, grid snapping (1x1, nxn), PC/NPC classification, and continuous scanning resilience.

title: Refactor god classes and large functions
description: Identify and refactor oversized classes and functions (e.g., in interactive_app.py or renderer.py) to improve maintainability and testability, adhering to SOLID principles.

title: Implement Distinct Visuals for Unknown ArUco Tokens
description: Implement dashed outlines or question mark icons for detected but unconfigured ArUco tokens in the renderer. Refer to features/aruco_token_tracking.md Section 3.4.A.

title: Document project configuration files
description: Create a markdown document in docs/ that describes all configuration files used in the project, their purpose, and their structure. Include: camera_calibration.npz, camera_extrinsics.npz, projector_calibration.npz, map_state.json, session.json, pytest.ini, requirements.txt, .python-version, and internal configs in src/light_map/.

title: Implement selection logic for duplicate ArUco IDs
description: Implement selection logic for duplicate ArUco IDs in a single frame to prevent flickering. Refer to features/aruco_token_tracking.md Section 3.4.B. The system should select the largest or most stable marker as the valid one for a given ID.

title: Document the Calibration Process
description: Create a comprehensive, step-by-step guide for both Camera Intrinsics and Projector-Camera (Extrinsics) calibration. Include troubleshooting tips, hardware setup advice (e.g., lighting, tripod stability), and an explanation of the math/theory (Parallax, Homography) for future maintainers. This should live in 'docs/calibration.md'.

title: Add Locking Feedback for Extrinsics Calibration Wizard
description: Improve the UX of ExtrinsicsCalibrationScene by adding real-time visual feedback (Green color + lock animation) when a marker is successfully detected on a target zone. Refer to features/improved_calibration_and_marker_defaults.md Section 3.4.

title: Improve test coverage
description: Increase unit test coverage to meet the 80% threshold defined in GEMINI.md. Focus on core logic in src/light_map/.
